0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Optimize Mnemosyne for your workload."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Benchmarks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["All benchmarks run on a single core, SQLite with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Metric | 1K Entries | 10K Entries | 100K Entries |\n|--------|-----------|-------------|--------------|\n| Write | 12ms | 15ms | 18ms |\n| Vector search | 15ms | 35ms | 85ms |\n| Hybrid search | 45ms | 65ms | 150ms |\n| FTS5 search | 5ms | 8ms | 20ms |\n| Consolidation | 2s | 5s | 25s |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Optimization Strategies"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"1. Batch Writes"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Bad: Individual writes\nfor item in items:\n  mem.remember(item)\n\n# Good: Batch transaction\nwith mem.transaction():\n  for item in items:\n      mem.remember(item)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"2. Connection Pooling"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-threaded applications:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(pool_size=10)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"3. Embedding Caching"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Cache embeddings to avoid redundant API calls:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(embedding_cache_size=10000)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"4. Index Tuning"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Rebuild indices after bulk load\nmem.rebuild_indices()\n\n# Analyze query patterns\nmem.analyze_queries()\n\n# Vacuum database\nmem.vacuum()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"5. Working Memory Limits"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Keep Working Memory lean:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"mem = Memory(\n  max_working=500,  # Lower = faster eviction, faster queries\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # More frequent consolidation\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Profiling"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Enable query logging\nmem = Memory(profile_queries=True)\n\n# Get slow queries\nslow = mem.slow_queries(min_latency_ms=100)\nfor q in slow:\n  print(f\"{q.latency_ms}ms: {q.query}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Memory Usage"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Component | Per Entry | 10K Entries |\n|-----------|-----------|-------------|\n| Working Memory | ~50KB | ~500MB |\n| Episodic Memory | ~2KB | ~20MB |\n| Semantic Memory | ~500B | ~5MB |\n| Vector Index | ~6KB | ~60MB |\n| FTS5 Index | ~2KB | ~20MB |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SSD Recommended"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite performance is heavily I/O bound. Use SSD storage for production deployments. HDD is acceptable for development but will show 5-10x slower query times."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/1324ugbfcq7x6.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"hOmP2Cy-yrrgTKgwHamoc"}
